pages.text:
CharCoat CC
PRODUCT DESCRIPTION
CharCoat CC is designed as an Intumescent fire protec(cid:415)on coa(cid:415)ng
for electrical cables. It is a water-based latex mas(cid:415)c coa(cid:415)ng for
interior and exterior applica(cid:415)ons specially developed to stop fire
from spreading and con(cid:415)nue ampacity on single, grouped or
bundled electrical cables for 90 minutes in a hydrocarbon
environment.
AUTHOR SEAN RITCHIE
APPLICATION AREAS
VERSION 5.0
CharCoat CC is assessed as a fire protec(cid:415)on coa(cid:415)ng for: PURPOSE/CHANGES WARRANTY
DATE PUBLISHED MAY 2025
• Electrical cable either single, grouped or in horizontal or ver(cid:415)cal
tray
• Suppor(cid:415)ng cable structures
CharCoat CC can be applied to interior and exterior electrical FEATURES AND BENEFITS
cables in industrial, marine and commercial projects or where • Intumescent Coa(cid:415)ng
cable protec(cid:415)on is required to avoid spread of flame or con(cid:415)nued • Water-based
ampacity. • Impermeable
• Classified for up to 90 minute Fire Ra(cid:415)ng 750(cid:1054)C
UV / ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION • Classified for up to 90 minute Fire Ra(cid:415)ng 1100(cid:1054)C
• Exterior applica(cid:415)on • Low DFT (Dry Film Thickness) of 1.6mm
• Latex based for water resistant applica(cid:415)on • Water (cid:415)ght / Air (cid:415)ght
• 100% UV Resistant • 100% UV Stable and weatherproof
• 0.5mm DFT for UV protec(cid:415)on only • Resistant to oil, various chemicals and petrol spills
• Salt water immersion tested and approved • Ageing resistant
• UV protec(cid:415)on extends cable sheath life up to 25 years • Highly flexible in cured form
• A(cid:332)er comple(cid:415)on (full cure) temperature resistant down to
TECHNICAL DATA
approx. -40°C
PROPERTIES RESULT
DIRECTION FOR USE:
Color White Recommended condi(cid:415)ons:
Solids 62% by weight | 53% by volume 1. Material and air temperature > 5°C, humidity < 80%.
2. Refer to complete applica(cid:415)on guide for spray units, hoses, (cid:415)ps
VOC 19 g/L
and pressures.
Velocity 50-60,000 cps
Elonga(cid:415)on ASTM D412 - 750% @ 1.6mm @ 21(cid:1054)C SHELF LIFE
Specific Gravity 1.22 g/L
When stored at the recommended condi(cid:415)ons, unopened pails
Wt/gallon 10lbs/gallon (4.53kg/gallon) have a shelf life of 18 months from date of manufacture.
PH 6.5-8.5
WARRANTY
Toxicity Non-toxic / Non-Hazardous
Twelve (18) months from date of manufacture.
UV 100% UV Resistant
LOI 89 (Limi(cid:415)ng Oxygen Index)
GENERAL INFORMATION
Current Capacity Non-Dera(cid:415)ng
For safe handling informa(cid:415)on on this product, please refer to the
Solvent Free
Safety Data Sheet (SDS). Use CharCoat CC in accordance with all
Asbestos Free applicable local and na(cid:415)onal regula(cid:415)on. As regula(cid:415)ons are o(cid:332)en
Halogen Free revisedpleaserequestfortheactualsafety data sheet before using
Mercury Free the product.
Plas(cid:415)cizer Free
Smoke Free

PREPARATION BEFORE APPLICATION TEST DATA
IMPORTANT:CharCoatCCmustbes(cid:415)rredthoroughlybefore
APPROVALS RESULT
applica(cid:415)on.
• Applica(cid:415)on by a slow running s(cid:415)rrer. IEC 60331-11* 90 Minute - 750(cid:1054)C & 1100(cid:1054)C
• Applica(cid:415)on by brush, roller or airless spraying. IEC 60331-21* 90 Minute - 750(cid:1054)C & 1100(cid:1054)C
• All cables and tray to be clean and free of dust/oils/solids. IEC 332-3-22 Category A/F - Pass - 0.93m
• For cold weather applica(cid:415)on contact CharCoat. ASTM E 84 Flame Spread “0”, Smoke “15”
• Exterior applica(cid:415)on does NOT require a topcoat. ASTM E 162 Pass
ASTM D4256-83 Radioac(cid:415)vity Decon. Factor - 5.83
COVERAGE RATE (without wastage)
UL723 (ASTM E 84) Flame Spread “0”, Smoke “15”
1. Approx. 3.0mm wet = 1.6mm dry = approx. 3.82kg/m² ABS American Bureau of Shipping
2. Thinning: max. 3% water (when required) Cer(cid:415)fied for marine applica(cid:415)ons
ASTM E 2599 Radiant Heat Test 2 hour - 957(cid:1054)C
DRYING
ASTM E1354 Cone Calorimeter
1. At 20°C object temperature and 65% rela(cid:415)ve ASTM D2863 LOI value of 89
2. Touch dry: approx. 2 hours KERI (Korea) NON DERATING
3. Full cure: approx. Min. 24-72 hours BS476: Part 6&7 “Class 0” spread of flame
BS6853 Zero smoke and toxicity
PACKAGING
BS6853 D 8.4 Smoke density
• 22.5 kg net weight (5 Gallons) ISO5660 Smoke produc(cid:415)on
• Weight / gallon = 4.53kg Rodent Cer(cid:415)ficate Rodent resistant
• Plas(cid:415)c pails LEED 29.95g/L
• Other sizes on request UV Stabi(cid:415)ty QUV: 100% UV Stable
Previous Tes(cid:415)ng Flame Retardant Coa(cid:415)ng
TRANSPORT / STORAGE PASSED - Ampacity
• Transportandstoragefreefromfrost preferablyataminimum PASSED - NON DERATING
of +5°C to a maximum of +32°C. PASSED - Salt Water Exposure
• Openedpailsmustbesealedcompletelyand1cup ofclean PASSED - Dielectric Strength
water placed over the coa(cid:415)ng. PASSED - Flamability Test
*Cable IEC 60331-11/21 - tested to 5000V and
8000V HV Power Cable
Suite 301 – 220 Brew Street, Port Moody, BC V3H 0H6 Canada
+1 604 941 1001 mail@CharCoat.com www.CharCoat.com
SALES AND FRANCHISE OFFICES LOCATED IN:
AUSTRALIA/NZ | CENTRAL AMERICA | CHINA | HONG KONG | INDIA | ISRAEL | MALAYSIA | PHILIPPINES | ROMANIA | SAUDI ARABIA | THAILAND | TURKEY | USA
